name: Evidence State Transition Prototype
controlling_principle: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
boundary: Static advisory prototype only. Evidence state transitions are illustrative and local-only. No backend persistence, live evidence retrieval, automated verification, workflow automation, ticketing, notifications, or enforcement is performed.
purpose: Show how evidence moves from weak states to verified_by_human while making the required human action, risk, and proof-pack consequence visible.

transitions.required_human_action: Add a source note, artifact reference, or uploaded evidence description.
transitions.required_documentation: Evidence title, source note, owner, and linked claim or decision.
transitions.risk_if_skipped: The Proof Pack may imply evidence exists when it does not.
transitions.proof_pack_consequence: Moves from Missing Evidence to Evidence State Map with caveat.
transitions.prototype_boundary: Local prototype transition only. No backend save or source retrieval.

transitions.required_human_action: Flag evidence for qualified review when reliance is high-stakes or external-facing.
transitions.required_documentation: Reliance purpose, reviewer role, risk if wrong, and review due date.
transitions.risk_if_skipped: Leadership may rely on provided but unreviewed evidence.
transitions.proof_pack_consequence: Evidence remains usable only with explicit caveat and human-review requirement.
transitions.prototype_boundary: Local prototype transition only. No automated verification.

transitions.required_human_action: Qualified reviewer confirms scope, source, currency, and relevance for the stated reliance purpose.
transitions.required_documentation: Reviewer name/role, review note, date, scope, and limitation statement.
transitions.risk_if_skipped: Evidence may be treated as verified without accountability.
transitions.proof_pack_consequence: May support proof-ready with caveats if all linked claims and decisions meet the same standard.
transitions.prototype_boundary: Static prototype only. Verification is not actually performed by CyberShield.

transitions.required_human_action: Provide evidence first, then route through needs_verification.
transitions.required_documentation: Evidence object, source note, owner, reviewer, and review rationale.
transitions.risk_if_skipped: An assumption may be mislabeled as verified evidence.
transitions.proof_pack_consequence: Must remain in Assumptions and Caveats until evidence is provided and reviewed.
transitions.prototype_boundary: Blocked transition in prototype and production design intent.

transitions.required_human_action: Resolve conflict, document why one source controls, and preserve dissenting evidence notes.
transitions.required_documentation: Conflict summary, controlling source rationale, reviewer note, and limitation statement.
transitions.risk_if_skipped: A conflict may be buried and later undermine the Proof Pack.
transitions.proof_pack_consequence: Must remain flagged as conflicting until resolution is documented.
transitions.prototype_boundary: Blocked transition in prototype and production design intent.

transitions.required_human_action: Review source date, current applicability, and replacement source needs.
transitions.required_documentation: Original date, reviewed date, currency rationale, and next source update action.
transitions.risk_if_skipped: Old evidence may be used for current decisions.
transitions.proof_pack_consequence: Evidence can remain in the Proof Pack only with currency caveat until updated.
transitions.prototype_boundary: Local prototype transition only. No live source freshness check.

definition_of_done: Transition cards appear in Evidence and Runtime
Allowed and blocked transitions are visually distinguishable
Required human action is visible per transition
Proof Pack consequence is visible per transition
Transition log modal and download work
No live workflow, automated verification, ticketing, notification, persistence, or integration claims
